weekly picks (Jun 5 week 2026)

Posted on June 29, 2026 in 2026jun,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 June 5th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score : 18742

2607.00630v1 Quench of chiral superconductivity by quantum phase fluctuations in twisted cuprate bilayers (arXiv)

  • Score : 17800

2606.28219v1 Higher dimensional quantum Hall effect and the analog of $W_\infty$-algebra (arXiv)

  • Score : 17750

s41563-026-02649-9 Fractional quantum anomalous Hall effect in moiré fractional Chern insulators (Nature Materials)

  • Score : 17651

2606.28846v1 Interplay of Electrode Coupling Engineering, Quasiperiodicity, and Magnetic Flux in Quantum Transport through a Su-Schrieffer-Heeger Ring (arXiv)

  • Score : 17607

2606.31663v1 Activated dynamics in the quantum random field Ising model (arXiv)

  • Score : 17318

2607.01994v1 False vacuum decay in a two-dimensional quantum spin system (arXiv)

  • Score : 17160

2607.01947v1 Fermiology and spin polarization of topological surface states in PtBi$_2$ (arXiv)

  • Score : 16216

2606.29266v1 Time-local nonequilibrium Green’s function method for real-time dynamics in quantum systems coupled to superconducting leads (arXiv)

  • Score : 16070

2607.00271v1 Valley-dependent electron optics using quantum dots in bilayer graphene (arXiv)

  • Score : 15983

s41563-026-02647-x Electron–phonon coupling and symmetry breaking in superconducting oxide interfaces near ferroelectric quantum criticality (Nature Materials)

  • Score : 15328

2606.30245v1 Topological control of third-harmonic generation in a mesoscopic quantum ring with spiral dislocation (arXiv)
